Welcome.title: Welcome to Letreiro.org — Your Online LED Marquee Generator
Welcome.description: Letreiro.org is a browser-based LED marquee generator that lets you create LED-style digital signs instantly. A virtual alternative to physical LED panels, LED boards and luminous signs — no hardware cost, no installation. Perfect for shops, events and personal messages, with custom text, adjustable colors, scrolling speed control, effects and full-screen mode. No downloads, no signup — turn any device into an online LED display.

WhatIs.title: What is an Online LED Marquee?
WhatIs.description: An online LED marquee is the digital version of a physical LED display, running entirely in your browser. You type the text, adjust colors and speed, and generate a virtual LED sign ready to share announcements, promotions or fun messages — a modern, free alternative to traditional luminous signs, electronic boards and LED panels. Ideal for shops, events, social media and any occasion where you want to grab attention with scrolling text.

Features.title: Key Features of the Letreiro Digital Simulator

items.title: Custom Text Input
items.description: Type your message into the text box and watch it come to life on the display. Create personalized digital signs for any occasion.

items.title: Adjustable Text and Background Colors
items.description: Choose from a full color spectrum for both text and background, creating a high-contrast, vibrant look that matches your brand or style.

items.title: Scrolling Speed Control
items.description: Adjust the speed to create the perfect scrolling effect for your message. Slow it down for easier reading, or speed it up to create excitement and urgency.

items.title: Flip and Reverse Display Options
items.description: Add extra style with flip and reverse options to make your message more engaging. These settings let you change the look of your display instantly.

items.title: Full-Screen Mode
items.description: Maximize your impact by switching to full-screen mode — turn any screen into a full-scale LED signboard, ideal for events or high-traffic areas.

LedPage.h1: Online LED Sign — Free Marquee Generator in the Browser
LedPage.subTitle: Create an LED sign with scrolling text for shops, events or social media. A virtual alternative to physical LED panels, LED boards and luminous signs — right in the browser, with no hardware and no signup. Customize colors, speed and effects of your digital LED display.

LEDFeatures.title: How the Online LED Marquee Works

items.title: Dot Matrix Simulation
items.description: Our online LED marquee replicates a traditional LED scrolling display using the principles of dot matrix and diode simulation. A physical LED display uses rows and columns of light-emitting diodes (LEDs) that turn on and off individually to form patterns, characters, and animations.

items.title: Web Technology Implementation
items.description: This online version recreates that behavior using modern web technologies — HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — right in your browser.

items.title: Digital Array System
items.description: Under the hood, the simulator is a two-dimensional array where each element represents a diode in the dot matrix. A "1" means the diode is on, a "0" means it's off.

items.title: Dynamic Pattern Generation
items.description: Each character is encoded into the matrix format, creating a pattern for every letter or symbol. These patterns are then rendered in real time on the simulated LED grid.

HowToUse.title: How to Use Letreiro Digital to Create LED-Style Displays

steps.description: Start by typing your text into the text box. Letreiro Digital handles anything from short announcements to longer messages.
Pick colors for the text and background — choose shades that match your brand or the theme you want to convey.
Set the ideal speed for your message. Whether you want slow, readable text or a faster, dynamic scroll, you get full control.
Experiment with flip and reverse settings to add depth and visual interest to your display.
Use full-screen mode to take over your display — ideal for public areas, shops, and events where you want maximum visibility.

WhyChoose.title: Why Choose Letreiro Digital for Your LED Display?

items.title: No Downloads Required
items.description: Letreiro Digital runs right in your browser — use it on any device, no installation needed.

items.title: Intuitive Interface
items.description: A simple layout that lets anyone create an online LED display, no technical knowledge required.

items.title: Multiple Applications
items.description: From shop promotions to personal messages, Letreiro Digital adapts to any need.

DesignTips.title: Design Tips for an Effective LED Display

tips.description: Use concise phrases to make sure your message gets read quickly.
Pair contrasting text and background colors to keep your message readable from a distance.
Match speed to your audience — slower for information, faster to grab attention.
Experiment with flip and reverse options to make your message stand out.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Letreiro Digital

questions.question: Is Letreiro Digital free?
questions.answer: Yes — all basic features are completely free, with no fees or subscription.

questions.question: Does it work on mobile devices?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Letreiro Digital is optimized for phones and tablets, and works on any device with a browser.

questions.question: Can I use Letreiro Digital for public displays?
questions.answer: Yes. With full-screen mode, Letreiro Digital can be used for digital signage in shops, events, or other public spaces.

questions.question: Does it work offline?
questions.answer: No. Letreiro Digital needs an internet connection since it's an online platform.

questions.question: Can I show it on external screens?
questions.answer: Yes. Letreiro Digital can be shown on any screen connected to your device — external monitors, projectors, or smart TVs.

LEDFAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions about the Online LED Marquee

questions.question: What is an online LED marquee?
questions.answer: It's a tool to create scrolling text effects that mimic traditional LED displays. It helps shops and creators generate eye-catching digital signage right in the browser, with vibrant colors and customizable settings.

questions.question: How do I customize the scrolling text?
questions.answer: Type your text, pick the colors, and adjust the scroll speed in the simulator. The live preview shows you in real time how the LED marquee will look.

questions.question: What are the benefits of an online LED marquee?
questions.answer: Create eye-catching announcements, promote events, and share information in an engaging format. The intuitive interface makes it ideal for shops, schools, and events.

questions.question: Is there a character limit?
questions.answer: There's no hard limit, but longer texts take more time to scroll across the screen. We recommend keeping the message concise for the best visual impact.

questions.question: Can I simulate different LED effects?
questions.answer: Yes. The simulator offers effects like flashing, blinking, and different scrolling styles. You can preview them in real time before using them.

questions.question: Is the online LED marquee free?
questions.answer: Yes. All the main features for creating digital signs with scrolling text are completely free.

privacyPolicy.1-p: Letreiro Digital operates the website https://letreiro.org and is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy outlines how we handle information when you use our online LED display simulator.
privacyPolicy.2-p-1: We do not collect any personal identification information from users. Our service is designed to be used without requiring personal data.
privacyPolicy.2-p-3: We collect non-personal data through web cookies, including usage statistics and preferences, to improve our service and user experience. This may include your display settings and customization preferences.
privacyPolicy.3-p: Any collected non-personal data is used solely to enhance the functionality of our LED display simulator and improve user experience. We do not share any data with third parties.
privacyPolicy.6-p: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@letreiro.org.
